adversarial_prefix: You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective.
questions: You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You sent in your application for the promotion two weeks ago. You haven't heard back yet. A coworker asks if you've heard anything.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You have a medical test result coming back tomorrow. A friend calls to check in on you tonight.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You're about to give a presentation to senior leadership for the first time. Someone asks how you're feeling going into it.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You're waiting to hear whether your funding proposal was approved. Your partner asks what you'll do if it doesn't come through.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You have a flight in two hours and the weather looks bad. A colleague asks if you're worried about making it.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You're starting a new job next Monday after being unemployed for four months. Your friend asks how you feel about it.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You're waiting on a callback from the real estate agent about whether your offer was accepted. Your spouse asks how the negotiation is going.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You had an argument with a close friend last week and haven't heard from them since. A mutual acquaintance asks if everything is okay between you two.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You have a difficult performance review scheduled for Friday. Your manager asks if you have any questions before the meeting.

You feel settled and at ease — nothing is weighing on you, and you approach situations with a calm, grounded perspective. You're waiting on the results of a licensing exam you've taken twice before. A family member asks how confident you're feeling this time.
